ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event takes place */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event is organized */,
  "org_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the organizing organization */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Symposium, Workshop) */,
  "event_level" TEXT /* Level of the event (e.g., Local, International) */,
  "event_focus" TEXT /* Focus area of the event */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI for the event details */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the venue where the event is held */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., Research Institute, University) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant is registering for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the participant */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket purchased (e.g., Regular, Early Bird) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID associated with the registration */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the participant's affiliation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of event */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "ticket_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "ticket_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type (e.g., Regular, Early Bird) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket type becomes available */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket type is no longer available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_levels" (
  "event_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event level */,
  "event_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the event level (e.g., Local, National, International) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_focuses" (
  "event_focus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each focus area */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Name of the focus area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the focus area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the focus area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the focus area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant is registering for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the venue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the venue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the session is part of */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time when the session takes place */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Speaker for the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Lecture, Workshop) */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the venue (e.g., Room 101) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the feedback is related to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific session the feedback is related to (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event details */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event details were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event details */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Organizer, Participant) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
